description: PubMed is the National Library of Medicine’s database of biomedical literature citations and related records. It is part of NCBI’s broader Entrez system for searching and retrieving life sciences and literature data.
summary: pubmed.gov itself exposes no separate developer surface; PubMed programmatic access is provided through NCBI’s public Entrez E-utilities HTTP API and the Entrez Direct CLI, with optional NCBI API keys for higher rate limits.
